title: Ramayana: Hanuman's Leap Across the Ocean
description: Hanuman expands to gigantic size and leaps across the ocean to Lanka — the greatest feat of devotion in Indian literature.
introduction: Hanuman expands to gigantic size and leaps across the ocean to Lanka — the greatest feat of devotion in Indian literature.

translation.text: Hanuman, the son of the Wind, gathered his strength. He grew to the size of a mountain and leaped into the sky toward Lanka.
